title: upgrade openai-audio to gpt-audio-mini, add openai-audio-large
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: High fidelity buzzing
gist.blurb: We swapped out the old audio preview models for the shiny new OpenAI audio-mini and audio-large. Your text-to-speech just got a serious upgrade.
gist.summary: Upgraded the default OpenAI audio endpoint to the latest mini model and added a new premium large model for high-fidelity generation.
gist.impact: Developers get access to better sounding audio generation immediately, with zero code changes required thanks to backward-compatible aliases.
gist.visual_concept: Audio upgrade metaphor. Polly the bee wearing headphones, interacting with sound equipment. Monitor robot enjoying the music. Visualized sound waves.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny chunky headphones, listening to a retro boombox that emits soft pastel sound waves. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head dances nearby. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
